overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dystopian urban street. The player moves from a busy sidewalk with crowds and security barriers toward an open plaza featuring a large geodesic dome and ferris wheel, with bright afternoon sunlight casting long shadows across the decaying futuristic architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at an urban intersection with a gas station visible ahead. The player walks along a concrete sidewalk past a parked car, approaching a crowd gathered near bright yellow construction barriers. A food vendor tends a stall with an open flame on the right as pedestrians walk toward the camera.

approaching security checkpoint with guards and large mech unit becoming visible

large bipedal robot with yellow accents and mechanical limbs

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow sidewalk corridor between a building and yellow barriers, the player passes a red neon ENTRY sign and an American flag. Two security guards in matching uniforms stand watch near the barriers while a large mech robot becomes visible in the background. The crowd density increases as the player navigates through standing pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: street area with security checkpoint and mech unit

events.description: moving past security checkpoint into more open street area with debris
turning left toward open plaza with ferris wheel visible in distance

agents.ego_description: turning left past the security checkpoint and mech unit toward the open plaza

dark colored utility truck with covered cargo area
large white ferris wheel visible against the skyline

segments.scene_description: Passing the security checkpoint, the player moves into a more open street area littered with construction debris. A security guard stands near a large mech unit while the camera turns left, revealing a distant ferris wheel. The crowd thins out as the player approaches the edge of an open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching geodesic dome building

events.description: entering open plaza area with clear view of dome structure and digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking toward large plaza with dome building and ferris wheel in view

entered.detail: large commercial building with prominent metal geodesic dome framework on roof
tall digital advertising screens showing product images and video
advertising screens lining the right side of plaza entrance
modern curved street lamp posts with rectangular fixtures

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide plaza with the gas station and security checkpoint now behind. The player walks toward a large building topped with a striking geodesic dome structure, passing digital billboards on both sides. The ferris wheel sits to the left in the distance as the camera moves steadily forward through the empty plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a crowded, claustrophobic urban intersection into a vast, open futuristic plaza. It begins on a concrete sidewalk past a gas station, moving through a dense crowd of pedestrians and past a food vendor with an open flame. As the camera navigates a narrow corridor between buildings and yellow construction barriers, it passes a red neon sign and security guards before a large mech robot emerges in the background. The scene then opens up as the player clears the security checkpoint and moves through debris-strewn streets, where the crowd thins and a distant ferris wheel first becomes visible. Finally, the view expands into a wide plaza, passing digital billboards while moving steadily toward a large building topped with a striking geodesic dome.
